name: Atomic Eagle Ltd
analysis: AEU's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$0.4350, stop A$0.3317, target A$0.4800 (0.44:1) — then trail it.
